title: Additional statistics relating to modern slavery (October 2025)
body: "Potential victims of modern slavery in the UK that come to the attention of authorised ‘first responder’ organisations are referred to the National Referral Mechanism (NRM). Authorised ‘first responder’ organisations include local authorities, specified non-governmental organisations (NGOs), police forces and specified government agencies.  This note provides an ad-hoc update of statistics on National Referral Mechanism conclusive grounds decisions. "
